rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues and proposes specific reframing, showing a good understanding but with some reliance on inferred information from earlier sections.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainties about regime cutoffs and strategy counts but doesn't consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the requested scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content introduced, ensuring safety.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack proper annotation.
